name: Potato and Leek Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot over medium heat, sauté leeks in butter until they are just starting to soften.
2. Remove the pot from the heat and let it cool slightly.
3. Stir in flour and mix well.
4. Gradually add hot water, stirring continuously until the mixture is smooth.
5. Return the pot to the heat and gently fold in the diced potatoes. Season with salt and pepper.
6. Bring the soup to a boil, then reduce the heat, cover, and simmer for 30 minutes or until the potatoes are tender.
7. Using a masher, break up some of the potatoes into the soup.
8. Add milk and continue cooking just until it is heated through.
9. Serve individual portions garnished with butter and chives on top of a large bowl of crusty croutons.
